message:
feat(demo): wire PerformanceHud accent color and chrome mapping

- Add PerformanceHud → PERFORMANCE accent color mapping in chrome.rs
  so the tab bar renders the correct screen-specific accent
- Add PERFORMANCE_HUD color token (ACCENT_9) to theme screen_accent
  module for distinct visual identity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
